OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Plaintiff Felix Lam is present.
Attorney Anna Leong for the plaintiff.
Defendant Felix Mancha is present in pro per.

Settlement discussions held with a Judge Samuel K. Feng. This case settles. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed. The trial date of Dec-09-2024 is vacated.
